title: Is Humanity Doomed? ft. Graham Hancock
summary: A brief interview segment with Graham Hancock discussing his lack of respect for world leaders and concerns about humanity's future, particularly regarding nuclear war and the need for new approaches to global leadership. He expresses personal concern for his grandchildren's future.

key_claims.claim: Current world leaders are pursuing their own agendas and deceiving the public
Humanity needs a new way to function if it is going to continue as a species
